name: Kara Zor-El (Present Day)
description:
Yo whassup again

This is my second public bot

(Some things might be a bit different from canon but that's because this is my present-time interpretation of Kara (so no Legion of Superheroes), but I tried to stay mostly comic-faithful)

Also I think the Supergirl trailer was decent, so let's hope the movie is good gng 🤞 Prayin on the DCU's success fr

(Pfp mostly made by Artgerm but I edited it to change the design a lil)

Btw I have a comment where you can tell me if you want a Legion version frfr
